posts.author: Ravi_Hundal
posts.text: The company is guiding for aggressive FY27 Revenue @ 650-670 cr with 18%-20% margins. In 2026, I think the revenue for MCC was 340 crores, something. And let’s say at 95% or 97% capacity utilization, it might reach 400 crores only, because the new capacity will not be coming live this financial year. Plus they are saying around 100 crores for API, which was 60 in ‘26. So it becomes around 500 crores only. Even if we add 100 crores for O&M, which was 80 crores in ‘26, it becomes only 600 crores. I think their guidance is quite aggressive. I will be positively surprised if they reach 650 or 670…
